SCOPE NOTE  smartart / chart intentionally excluded

smartart and chart element types exist in the native-pptx-engine (engine.ts) but require hand-authored raw OOXML diagram/chart XML with no example fixture anywhere in this repo — zero test coverage for either path. Rather than risk a corrupt file from hand-written XML, this deck covers the other 6 element types plus all 11 layout presets. If smartart/chart matter for your use case, that is a separate, focused follow-up — flag it and we can build a minimal known-good fixture for just those two paths.
Kyberion design-system diagnostic deck — generated via media-actuator pptx_render
